recommendations.title: The Woman in Black
recommendations.overview: A lawyer travels to a small seaside town to settle the estate of a recently deceased woman, but soon becomes ensnared in something much more sinister.

recommendations.title: Northanger Abbey
recommendations.overview: A young woman's penchant for sensational Gothic novels leads to misunderstandings in the matters of the heart.

recommendations.title: The Good Witch
recommendations.overview: A mysterious woman comes in to town and inhabits the local haunted mansion, making everyone wonder if she's a witch or "The Grey Lady".

recommendations.title: The Influence
recommendations.overview: After moving back to her family home to care for her dying mother, a nurse haunted by her childhood memories must struggle with an evil force in the house.

recommendations.title: Amityville 1992: It's About Time
recommendations.overview: A hot-shot architect returns home from his latest business trip with a surprise: an ornate old clock rescued out of a soon-to-be-demolished mansion in Amityville, New York, that brings about a seemingly unstoppable demonic force.

recommendations.title: Mr. Brooks
recommendations.overview: A psychological thriller about a man who is sometimes controlled by his murder-and-mayhem-loving alter ego.

recommendations.title: The Bad Seed
recommendations.overview: A widower suspects that his seemingly perfect adolescent daughter is a heartless killer.

recommendations.title: R.L. Stine's Monsterville: The Cabinet of Souls
recommendations.overview: Teenage friends must resist the spell of an evil showman staging a house of horrors show in their small town.

recommendations.title: House of the Witch
recommendations.overview: A group of high-school kids set out to play a Halloween prank at an abandoned house, but once they enter they become victims of a demonic witch who has set her wrath upon them.

recommendations.title: The Church
recommendations.overview: In a Gothic cathedral built on the mass grave of a Teutonic purge, an ancient discovery by the new librarian will release an unholy maelstrom of madness, violence, and demonic vengeance.
